title: Flevance Burns
description: Pages 1–5 focus on flevance burns, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Donquixote Family, Corazon, Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the fall of Flevance and Law's escape into Doflamingo's orbit reveal how disease, war, and prejudice created his despair.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: The Don- Quixote family of yesteryear meets under one roof!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Behehe! Hey Heey, Law~ It's been a week? Feelin' homesick yet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember that the

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Corazon's really done a number on you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kids and grownups alike split the first chance they get! We're the select, powerful few that've remained.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I wonder how long a powerless, little shit like you will last?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Donquixote Pirates Captain Donquixote Doflamingo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No matter what happens, you must remember the "edict of blood"!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: An affront to an executive of the family is tantamount to an affront to the family itself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Once, I laughed at Lord Pica,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And I almost died during the torture they put me through afterward!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kyahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I ain't afraid of him... I've seen hell itself.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Boy from the White City TrafAlgar Law (Age: 10)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pufupa: You're free to Bluff and blow hot air to your hearts content,

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: But remember this! Corazon is my precious, little brother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I will personally bring death to anyone that so much as touches a hair on his head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This kid... his skin's white-lin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's the Amber lead sickness! I have no desire to catch that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What!? It's contagious? Gross! You, get out of here right now dasuyan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: GRR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Giola! Don't repeat rumor as fact. That pisses me off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Look, Buffalo's gone and believed you. Amber lead sickness is a type of poisoning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It cannot be transmitted to others.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: But just in case, you better not get close to me dasuyan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I ain't about to catch something like that dasuyan!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Are there any other survivors left in FleVance?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I don't know. I barely managed to escape myself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: How'd you even manage to get out?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: hidden in the mountains of corpses...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I crossed the border.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: UCHK!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Oi, we're eating here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What is it that you resent so?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I no longer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: believe in anything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I ain't even scared of dying!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: corazon, you better not get carried away with yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I promise you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I will have my revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Are you stupid or something!? Weren't you listening!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Stuff like that is what gets you tortured, idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: You're probably thinking that just because you're a kid you can cry and apologize and pretend like nothing ever happened, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: You're gonna get the "Skewer torture"! Don't mess around with pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: What is this "White City" that he's from anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: All of the country of Flevance was known by that name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Its people were all wealthy and the streets themselves seemed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Straight out of the snow countries of fairy tales. The earth, the trees and grass were all pure white...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I hear that its beauty was so spectacular that it made you question whether it was real or not...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: UHhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: One day, a certain type of lead, "Amber LEAD," was discovered beneath the kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: It was determined that that mineral was the source of the wondrous nature of the land.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: And from it utensils, paints, sweets...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Makeup, and even weapons were made...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Customers from across the world flocked to purchase the high-quality goods made from Amber lead.

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: It became Flevance's primary export.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: The quick- to-notice world government began to transport the goods in and out of the city and its transporta- lion industry boomed.

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Amber LEAD BIRTHED FLEVANCE BOTTOMLESS WEALTH.

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Flevance was the envy of the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: People were G- Louis!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Wow... I wanna go there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Sadly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: It no longer exists.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: What!?

summary: Flevance Burns advances the Dressrosa story through Donquixote Family, Corazon, Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
